title: <time.h> should be avoided
description: "<time.h>" should not be usedAnalyze your codeconsistency-conventionalmaintainabilityCode Smellbased-on-misralock-inWhy is this an issue?More InfoIncludestime,strftime. This library is associated with clock times. Various aspects are implementation dependent or unspecified, such as the formats of times.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: time.h header should be avoided due to implementation-dependent behavior. Consider using modern alternatives.
